subject: AI April is ending. Here's what you're missing.
body:
Still a few hours left to get 60% off (or more) on 2-year plans. Returns to normal May 1.

It's Fahim again. Consider this your final reminder to take advantage of your AI April offers.

Денис, here's your link:

Lock In Your Offer → (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VWKvrX16KrxwW5TMzgJ8w3nfHW9ccHTJ5Nw3D9N861KBn3prCCW8wLKSR6lZ3pRN3ntnk6K-hkcW2_JV6y78V_1nW9lr49M8mng5kV94qK86WsVpPW5mfQqK80MDzJVlGsRN5vF4RyW9ky7-r8f6p1sW172msQ2T8G3wW6N5HtP6xR9g8W62DH_16P4GwZW5TCSl637wT55W5CrtP79d0WcJW1Z5p0t13gHTxVczP8v6b1NpQW5RnKx87Hsjc4W3q0N1B5YqT_dW1S5Zm42mPcm5W5w42Jx8lNRJpW1YDv1m3Dpcj4W32mF7z69SJlFVHGsn51v9b9SW70FpKY3WGf0dW226qD456f9NPW1SSBM625dd5JW5XTG4d7Q_DYBW8K2hH96zPqsZW2G82vv5Dfn0_W97vvwd6zpVnSf80Lxzn04 )

It's the best way to actually start building with need-to-know AI tools and technologies (MCP, RAG, Codex, Cursor, OpenClaw, etc)... all at a massive discount.

Think 43 cents per day for unlimited learning. Definitely worth it. But it all goes back to normal May 1.

Happy learning!

Fahim ul Haq
